executionArgs.additionalInstruction: This is a Flutter/Dart POS backend API test. Base URL is http://localhost:8080. All tests should use the REST API directly via HTTP requests. Login credentials: email=owner@ostora.sa, password=owner@ostora.sa. Store uses /api prefix for all endpoints. For authentication tests: POST /api/auth/login with JSON body {email, password}. Extract Bearer token from response. For all other tests: include Authorization: Bearer <token> header. Test IDs TC001-TC135 cover auth, catalog, inventory, POS, orders, payments, customers, dashboard, reports, staff, notifications, promotions, config, subscription, onboarding, and label printing APIs.
